```py
/*Table 1: Agg Data per Date & Product */
SELECT DateKey
       ,ProductKey
       ,SUM(SalesAmount) AS SalesAmount
       ,SUM(SalesQuantity) AS SalesQuantity 
FROM FactOnlineSales 
GROUP BY DateKey
        ,ProductKey
```

```py
/*Table 2: Agg Data per Date & Store */
SELECT DateKey
       ,StoreKey
       ,SUM(SalesAmount) AS SalesAmount
       ,SUM(SalesQuantity) AS SalesQuantity 
FROM FactOnlineSales 
GROUP BY DateKey
        ,StoreKey
```
